sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hive_hash (id Int32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_hive_hash (id, value) VALUES (1, 'Hello, world!');
UPDATE test_hive_hash SET value = 'ClickHouse Test' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hiveHash(value) AS hash_value FROM test_hive_hash;
SELECT id FROM test_hive_hash WHERE hiveHash(value) = hiveHash('ClickHouse Test');
